body:
Halloween Event 2024: Feather Hunt!

This year, we’re bringing you a unique Halloween adventure—finding hidden feathers across our virtual world! The feathers are essential collectibles, scattered at key coordinates that only the keenest explorers will discover. To uncover these feathers, you’ll need to tap into your best map skills, as only four feathers are available and can only be located with advanced knowledge of the landscape.

To make the hunt more manageable, we’ve added support for the Fabric Mod on thelotus.tv! This mod will assist you in tracking down those elusive feathers, offering helpful insights into your surroundings. Ready to rise to the challenge and locate all four feathers? Happy hunting, and may the best feather-finder win!



HalloweenEvent 2024 Federn finden.. Koordianten herausfinden für thelotus.tv
Fabric Mod um die Federn besser zu finden (4 Federn können nur doch Map Kenntnisse gefunden werden)
